text:
IT IS ORDERED THAT:

The child[ren] shall be placed in the care of the applicant until [date].

The [private law] / [care] proceedings shall be allocated to the Family Court sitting at [place].

The [private law] / [care] proceedings shall be listed for a case management hearing at the Family Court sitting at [place] as soon as possible and in any event by not later than [date]. The proceedings shall be listed with a time estimate of one hour.

The evidence filed in proceedings [transfer proceedings] shall stand as evidence in these proceedings.

There be no order for costs.

Dated [date]

metadata.source: Standard Family Orders — Volume 2: Children and Other Orders (May 2026)
metadata.title: In the High Court of Justice
